occurrence_sentence: And one QC company, founded in 2012 (eons ago as far as startups in the space go), has ambitions that spread far and wide. They're called Qubitekk (formerly GridCOM Technologies), a Vista, California-based firm which is researching systems and components in the industry that includes quantum cryptography, QC sensing tools, educational and research resources.

mentions.occurrence_sentence: And one QC company, founded in 2012 (eons ago as far as startups in the space go), has ambitions that spread far and wide. They're called Qubitekk (formerly GridCOM Technologies), a Vista, California-based firm which is researching systems and components in the industry that includes quantum cryptography, QC sensing tools, educational and research resources.
The company's goal is to build a quantum computer 'that will be orders of magnitude faster than today's fastest supercomputer.'
